diagrams.title: Virtual to Physical Address Translation
diagrams.description: Shows how virtual address is translated to physical address using page table
diagrams.purpose: Understanding address translation in paging systems

diagrams.title: Page Replacement Flowchart
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing steps when a page fault occurs and no free frames available
diagrams.purpose: Understanding page replacement process and decision making

diagrams.title: Memory Management Techniques Comparison
diagrams.description: Comparison of contiguous allocation, paging, and segmentation
elements: Contiguous: Single block, simple but fragments
Paging: Fixed blocks, no external fragmentation
Segmentation: Variable logical blocks, programmer view
diagrams.purpose: Comparing different memory management strategies and their trade-offs

diagrams.title: Thrashing Cycle
diagrams.description: Diagram showing the thrashing phenomenon and its relationship with degree of multiprogramming
elements: Page Fault Rate increases dramatically in thrashing zone
diagrams.purpose: Understanding thrashing and its relationship with system load
